lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬੇ ਥਾਈ ਏਕੁ ਤੂੰ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: sarabe thaaee ek toon jiau bhaavai tiau raakh |
lines.english: In all places, You are the One and Only. As it pleases You, Lord, please save and protect me!

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਵਾਈਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਚੁ ਭਾਖੁ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: haumai rog gavaaeeai sabad sachai sach bhaakh |8|
lines.english: Eradicate the disease of egotism, and chant the True Shabad, the Word of the True Lord. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਭਲੋ ਪਤਿ ਸਾਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramat saachaa man vasai naam bhalo pat saakh |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the True One abides within the mind. The Companionship of the Naam brings the most excellent honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਕਾਸੀ ਪਾਤਾਲਿ ਤੂੰ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aakaasee paataal toon tribhavan rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: You are pervading throughout the Akaashic Ethers, the nether regions and the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤੀ ਭਾਉ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhagatee bhaau toon aape mileh milaae |
lines.english: You Yourself are bhakti, loving devotional worship. You Yourself unite us in Union with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੯॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai jiau bhaavai tivai rajaae |9|13|
lines.english: O Nanak, may I never forget the Naam! As is Your Pleasure, so is Your Will. ||9||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖੁ ਤੂੰ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau bhaavai tiau raakh toon mai har naam adhaar |1|
lines.english: As it pleases You, please save me, Lord. The Name of the Lord is my Support. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਅਵਰੁ ਕਿ ਕਰੀ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam man bedhiaa avar ki karee veechaar |
lines.english: My mind is pierced through by the Name of the Lord. What else should I contemplate?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਤਉ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad surat sukh aoopajai prabh raatau sukh saar |
lines.english: Focusing your awareness on the Shabad, happiness wells up. Attuned to God, the most excellent peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਸਾਚੀ ਖਸਮ ਰਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re saachee khasam rajaae |
lines.english: O mind, the Will of our Lord and Master is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਾਜਿ ਸੀਗਾਰਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੇਤੀ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin tan man saaj seegaariaa tis setee liv laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Focus your love upon the One who created and adorned your body and mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਮਧਾ ਜੇ ਕਰੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਅਗਨਿ ਜਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tan man samadhaa je karee anadin agan jalaae |
lines.english: and if I make my body and mind into firewood, and night and day burn them in the fire,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਬੈਸੰਤਰਿ ਹੋਮੀਐ ਇਕ ਰਤੀ ਤੋਲਿ ਕਟਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tan baisantar homeeai ik ratee tol kattaae |
lines.english: If I cut my body into pieces, and burn them in the fire,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਰਧ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਕਟਾਈਐ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਰਵਤੁ ਧਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aradh sareer kattaaeeai sir karavat dharaae |
lines.english: If my body were cut in half, if a saw was put to my head,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਤੁਲਿ ਨ ਪੁਜਈ ਜੇ ਲਖ ਕੋਟੀ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har naamai tul na pujee je lakh kottee karam kamaae |2|
lines.english: and if I perform hundreds of thousands and millions of religious rituals-still, all these are not equal to the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਤੁਲਿ ਨ ਪੁਜਈ ਸਭ ਡਿਠੀ ਠੋਕਿ ਵਜਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har naamai tul na pujee sabh dditthee tthok vajaae |3|
lines.english: None of these are equal to the Name of the Lord. I have seen and tried and tested them all. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਹੈਮੰਚਲਿ ਗਾਲੀਐ ਭੀ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tan haimanchal gaaleeai bhee man te rog na jaae |
lines.english: and if my body were frozen in the Himalayas-even then, my mind would not be free of disease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਕੇ ਕੋਟ ਦਤੁ ਕਰੀ ਬਹੁ ਹੈਵਰ ਗੈਵਰ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: kanchan ke kott dat karee bahu haivar gaivar daan |
lines.english: If I made a donation of castles of gold, and gave lots of fine horses and wondrous elephants in charity,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਮਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਗਊਆ ਘਣੀ ਭੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗਰਬੁ ਗੁਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhoom daan gaooaa ghanee bhee antar garab gumaan |
lines.english: and if I made donations of land and cows-even then, pride and ego would still be within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਸਚੁ ਦਾਨੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: raam naam man bedhiaa gur deea sach daan |4|
lines.english: The Name of the Lord has pierced my mind; the Guru has given me this true gift. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠ ਬੁਧੀ ਕੇਤੀਆ ਕੇਤੇ ਬੇਦ ਬੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth budhee keteea kete bed beechaar |
lines.english: There are so many stubborn-minded intelligent people, and so many who contemplate the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਹੁ ਓਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਉਪਰਿ ਸਚੁ ਆਚਾਰੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sachahu orai sabh ko upar sach aachaar |5|
lines.english: Truth is higher than everything; but higher still is truthful living. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਤੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਜੀਅ ਕੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: kete bandhan jeea ke guramukh mokh duaar |
lines.english: There are so many entanglements for the soul. Only as Gurmukh do we find the Gate of Liberation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੈ ਭਾਂਡੇ ਸਾਜਿਐ ਇਕੁ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eikanai bhaandde saajiai ik chaanan tihu loe |
lines.english: The One Lord has fashioned the vessels, and His One Light pervades the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਊਚਾ ਆਖੀਐ ਨੀਚੁ ਨ ਦੀਸੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko aoochaa aakheeai neech na deesai koe |
lines.english: Call everyone exalted; no one seems lowly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਧੁਰਿ ਬਖਸ ਨ ਮੇਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: karam milai sach paaeeai dhur bakhas na mettai koe |6|
lines.english: Receiving His Grace, we obtain Truth. No one can erase His Primal Blessing. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨੈ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: saadh milai saadhoo janai santokh vasai gur bhaae |
lines.english: When one Holy person meets another Holy person, they abide in contentment, through the Love of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖਿਆ ਦਰਗਹਿ ਪੈਧਾ ਜਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: pee amrit santokhiaa darageh paidhaa jaae |7|
lines.english: Drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar, they are contented; they go to the Court of the Lord in robes of honor. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਥ ਕਥਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਜੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: akath kathaa veechaareeai je satigur maeh samaae |
lines.english: They contemplate the Unspoken Speech, merging in absorption in the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਵਾਜੈ ਕਿੰਗੁਰੀ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt vaajai kinguree anadin sabad subhaae |
lines.english: In each and every heart the Music of the Lord's Flute vibrates, night and day, with sublime love for the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਰਲੇ ਕਉ ਸੋਝੀ ਪਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਸਮਝਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: virale kau sojhee pee guramukh man samajhaae |
lines.english: Only those few who become Gurmukh understand this by instructing their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਛੂਟੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ॥੮॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai chhoottai sabad kamaae |8|14|
lines.english: O Nanak, do not forget the Naam. Practicing the Shabad you shall be saved. ||8||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਿਤੇ ਦਿਸਹਿ ਧਉਲਹਰ ਬਗੇ ਬੰਕ ਦੁਆਰ ॥
lines.translit: chite diseh dhaulahar bage bank duaar |
lines.english: There are painted mansions to behold, white-washed, with beautiful doors;

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਮਨ ਖੁਸੀ ਉਸਾਰਿਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: kar man khusee usaariaa doojai het piaar |
lines.english: they were constructed to give pleasure to the mind, but this is only for the sake of the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਖਾਲੀ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਢਹਿ ਢੇਰੀ ਤਨੁ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: andar khaalee prem bin dteh dteree tan chhaar |1|
lines.english: The inner being is empty without love. The body shall crumble into a heap of ashes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੋ ਜੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan niramalo je devai devanahaar |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the pure wealth; it is given only by the Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੋ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam dhan niramalo gur daat kare prabh soe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the pure wealth; through the Guru, God bestows this gift. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re tan dhan saath na hoe |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, this body and wealth shall not go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਛਡਾਏ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap chhaddaae chhutteeai aape bakhasanahaar |2|
lines.english: He Himself delivers those who are delivered. He Himself is the Forgiver. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਪੂਛ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜਿਸੁ ਬੇਲੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aagai poochh na hovee jis belee gur karataar |
lines.english: One who has the Guru, the Creator, as his Friend, shall not be questioned hereafter.
